Metadata.title: Certo Governance Institute
Metadata.description: Independent rating agency assessing the quality of governance in the public, corporate, medical and defense sectors.

Home.title: Certo Governance Institute
Home.description: Certo is the world's first rating agency whose ratings are cryptographic artifacts of process — not opinions. Every rating decision is anchored outside our own infrastructure, verifiable offline and publicly auditable.

About.title: About Certo Governance Institute
About.mission_text: Building a culture of good governance through independent assessment and promotion of governance standards in Poland and Europe.
About.independence_text: The Foundation is independent from the assessed entities, public authorities and commercial interests.
About.methodology_text: Certo Ratings are based on rigorous methodology grounded in ISO standards and EU guidelines.
